ddls:
CREATE TABLE "query_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query run */,
  "query_number" INTEGER /* Number of the query being run */,
  "gt_value" REAL /* Ground truth value of the query */,
  "est_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the query */,
  "std_value" REAL /* Standard deviation of the query */,
  "lower_ci" REAL /* Lower confidence interval of the query */,
  "upper_ci" REAL /* Upper confidence interval of the query */,
  "rng_time" REAL /* Random number generation time (RNG Time) */,
  "total_time" REAL /* Total time taken for the query */,
  "hit_status" INTEGER /* Hit status (1 for hit, 0 for miss) */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the query run was executed */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the query run */,
  "run_version" INTEGER /* Version of the query being run */,
  "query_status" TEXT /* Status of the query run (e.g., completed, failed, in progress) */,
  "query_duration" REAL /* Duration of the query run */,
  "query_memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the query run */,
  "query_cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the query run */,
  "query_io_usage" REAL /* I/O usage during the query run */,
  "query_error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the query fails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_runs_query_number FOREIGN KEY ("query_number") REFERENCES queries ("query_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query_number" INTEGER /* Number of the query */,
  "query_sql" TEXT /* SQL code of the query */,
  "query_description" TEXT /* Description of the query */,
  "query_category" TEXT /* Category of the query (e.g., customer, inventory) */,
  "query_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the query for better organization */,
  "query_author" TEXT /* Author of the query */,
  "query_last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the query */,
  "query_last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the query */,
  "query_execution_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the query has been executed */,
  "query_average_runtime" REAL /* Average runtime of the query over all runs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query run */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the performance metric */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., database, application) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES query_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confidence_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confidence interval */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query run */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level (e.g., 95%) */,
  "interval_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the confidence interval was calculated */,
  "interval_source" TEXT /* Source of the confidence interval (e.g., database, application) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confidence_intervals_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES query_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Number of the run */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query being run */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date when the run was executed */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the run was executed */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the run */,
  "run_version" INTEGER /* Version of the query being run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the run (e.g., completed, failed, in progress) */,
  "run_duration" REAL /* Duration of the run */,
  "run_memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage during the run */,
  "run_cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage during the run */,
  "run_io_usage" REAL /* I/O usage during the run */,
  "run_error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the run fails */,
  "run_initiator" TEXT /* User who initiated the run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "setup_details" TEXT /* Setup details of the environment (e.g., hardware, software) */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of the environment (e.g., production, staging, development) */,
  "environment_status" TEXT /* Current status of the environment (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "environment_last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the environment */,
  "environment_last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the environment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, engineer) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "user_last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the role */,
  "role_last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query run being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query version */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the query */,
  "version_sql" TEXT /* SQL code of the query version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "version_last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the version */,
  "version_last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_versions_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES queries ("query_id")
)
